CreateASnapshot.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](BCC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
CreateASnapshot.volumeId: ID of the disk to create a snapshot from; use the instance ID for system disks.
CreateASnapshot.snapshotName: Snapshot name. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -\_ /. Must start with a letter. Length: 1–65 characters.
CreateASnapshot.desc: Snapshot description (optional). Supports Chinese characters, letters, digits, and the following characters: . space _ - = , ， ： / 。
CreateASnapshot.retentionInDays: Snapshot retention period in days. Default is -1 (permanent). Valid range: 1–10000.
